key_concepts: How to run an Opal app, How to share an app publicly, How to monitor workflow execution
faq_question: How do I run and share an AI app I built in Opal?
faq_answer: Click 'Start' to run your app and provide any required input. You can monitor the execution progress in the workflow view. To share, click 'Share App', set permissions to 'Public' or 'Anyone with the link', and then copy the generated link.
